title: Trades tab — poll /api/trades, render trades table with safe money parsing
acceptance_criteria: usePaperTrades polls GET /api/trades on a ~10s interval via the T-04 api helper, using AbortController and clearing the timer + aborting in-flight requests on unmount; no overlapping requests (do not start a new poll while one is in flight).
It normalizes the running envelope: {data: PaperTrade[]} -> trades; {data: [], message} -> empty list; HTTP/network error -> a distinct error state (NOT silently treated as 'no trades').
It returns { trades, loading, error } and is reused by T-03 (single source of truth for trade data) — do not duplicate the fetch in PnlView.

TradesView renders a table: entry time formatted in IST (T-04 helper), open/closed status badge, straddle-at-entry, gross and net P&L colored by sign (green positive / red negative / neutral zero) using T-04 null-safe coercion + formatter, and exit reason. Open trades with null P&L render as '—', never as 0.
Distinct empty state ('no trades yet') and error state ('couldn't load trades — retrying') — the two must be visually and semantically different.
Named exports only; TypeScript strict passes.
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
